WASHINGTON. Nov. 19.-Carrie
Nation was forcibly elected from the
White House this morning after en-
deavoring to force her way into the
presence of the president She enter
ed at 10 o'clock, when Secretary Loeb
explained that the president was busy.
She sat down and for half an hour
kept up running comment with
other visitors who entered Finally
she walked into Loeh's office and said
she demanded to see the pres dent i'm
mediately. She wanted to ask him
why he visited a dive In Kansas when
he took his western tour. Loeb. after
Il vain attempt to pacify her. called
two officers, who were compelled to
drag the smasher out, as she resisted
TO the utmost.


She created scene In the street
afterwards by praying for the cleo
ton of II prohibition president who
would represent the people and not
the brewers.


She came here from Baltimore last
night. where her troupe is playing
Ten Nights In Bar Room"
